name: Custom Profile Music
description: Liven up your profile with songs!

profile-song-id.name: Profile Song ID
profile-song-id.description: Newgrounds/NCS song ID to show on your profile.

profile-song-offset.name: Song Start Offset(s)
profile-song-offset.description: Start Offset of your profile song. (seconds)

no-pulse.name: Disable Interface Pulse
no-pulse.description: Disables pulsing effects on the interface.

no-notes.name: Disable Floating Notes
no-notes.description: Disables the floating notes on the right side of the screen.
